headline: Design-quality skill vendored: curated impeccable subset committed under .claude/skills/impeccable/ + new skills-lock.json pin (branch claude/hirobius-design-skills-jr28dm; CLAUDE.md routes /impeccable critique→polish before any client-site ship — complements, never replaces, the purity/acceptance gates). Prior: Section-variant harvest mechanism merged (#134, epic #128 — authorized freeze exception, conversion work for differentiated outreach previews): ClientConfig gains layout.sections.<id>.variant closed enums (fully defaulted, legacy layout.variant B bridged to hero 'video', ops vendored schema re-synced on ops branch claude/astro-sections-harvest-nzr27g), Hero split into per-variant files behind a dispatcher (byte-identical proof on demo + gallery dists), two harvested hero variants landed (split-card, banner — from-scratch universal patterns per the new docs/HARVESTING.md contract), a deterministic purity gate (purity.test.ts) sweeps every template component for literal colors/palette classes/rogue scripts/imports/external URLs, SECTION_VARIANT_COMPONENTS registry is test-pinned against schema+filesystem, the gallery grew a /variants page with per-section Playwright screenshots, and the fg/muted contrast pair joined acceptance (#79 hardening). Template bumped to 0.4.0 (fleet event; default markup unchanged, CSS hash changes). Also this week: Ralph's idle-watchdog + blocked-stop reconcile fix shipped fleet-wide (ralph#13/#14 + callers #124/#167/#177 + kit re-syncs #125/#168/#178; both P0s cleared — ops#99, hds#126) on top of the earlier burndown batch (#42 etc.). PR #136 (Closes #105) opened: build-time branded OG-image fallback (sharp-only SVG->PNG, no new dep) — generates dist/og-image.png when seo.ogImage is unset, wired into every app, missing-og-image acceptance check retired now that it's auto-satisfiable. Awaiting human PR approval. All 7 apps build clean. Engine still frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: Run the Visual Baseline Seed action to seed variants-*.png (#129); merge the companion ops branch claude/astro-sections-harvest-nzr27g (vendored schema re-sync)
Harvest next: services section variants (cards, alternating) via docs/HARVESTING.md (#130); first open-source-theme port to exercise the ATTRIBUTIONS path (#131, needs-adrian source pick)

Ralph idle-watchdog + reconcile fix DONE fleet-wide; make `Engine tests` (hirobius/ralph) and each repo's ralph-gate the required branch-protection checks; triage ops's pre-existing red pnpm-audit gate (55 vulns, non-required); fix the ralph README's `git tag -f v1` line — v1 is a branch
Work the open needs-human backlog: trust/conversion fields (#87), per-vertical content packs (#85), analytics/conversion events (#84), aesthetics dials (#86)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
blocked: Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
#84/#85/#87/#35/#41/#27 need a human decision before Ralph can pick them up
